radiomic feature extraction hippocampus pipeline
  • User Guides / Tutorials
  • Cli Scripts
  • View page source

Cli Scripts

Run Pipeline

Hippocampus Radiomic Feature Extraction Pipeline Runner Processes subjects in batches with progress tracking

This is the main entry point for the pipeline. All utility functions are imported from the run_utils package.

pipeline.run_pipeline.main()[source]

Execute the hippocampus radiomic feature extraction pipeline.

This function:

  1. Parses CLI arguments.

  2. Resolves and validates the Snakemake profile.

  3. Loads profile defaults (e.g., cores).

  4. Discovers or validates subject list.

  5. Splits subjects into batches.

  6. Executes Snakemake per batch.

  7. Runs aggregation step if all batches succeed.

  8. Optionally cleans intermediate files.

  9. Prints a final execution summary and exits with appropriate code.

The function assumes execution inside the Apptainer container where:

  • BIDS data is mounted at /data

  • Logs are written under /app/logs

  • Pipeline code resides under /app/pipeline

Exit Codes

0

All batches (and aggregation, if applicable) completed successfully.

1

One or more batches failed, profile not found, or no subjects detected.

raises SystemExit:

Always exits explicitly with code 0 or 1.

rtype:

None

Run CSC

CSC Puhti Pipeline Runner.

Interactive and CLI-based wrapper for executing the hippocampus radiomic feature extraction workflow on CSC’s Puhti cluster using SLURM and Apptainer.

This script provides:

  • Interactive or fully CLI-driven configuration

  • Automatic Snakemake profile generation

  • CSC-specific environment setup (TMPDIR, bind mounts)

  • Real-time progress tracking from Snakemake logs

  • Optional cleanup of intermediate outputs

Typical Usage

Interactive mode:

python run_csc.py

Non-interactive mode:

python run_csc.py –project 2001988 –bids-root /scratch/project_2001988/user/Dataset –sif /scratch/project_2001988/user/Containers/pipeline.sif

Dry run:

python run_csc.py –dry-run

pipeline.run_csc.banner(text)[source]

Print a formatted section banner to stderr.

Parameters:

text (str) – Title text to display inside the banner.

pipeline.run_csc.check_snakemake()[source]

Verify that Snakemake >= 8 is available in PATH.

If Snakemake is missing or too old, attempts to load it via Lmod module system (e.g., module load snakemake on CSC Puhti).

Returns:

Snakemake version string if found and satisfies minimum, otherwise None.

Return type:

str or None

pipeline.run_csc.err(msg)[source]

Print an error message to stderr.

Parameters:

msg (str) – Error message to display.

pipeline.run_csc.gather_config(args)[source]

Collect all pipeline configuration from CLI arguments and interactive prompts.

Parameters:

args (argparse.Namespace) – Parsed command-line arguments object.

Returns:

Dictionary of configuration values.

Return type:

dict

pipeline.run_csc.info(msg)[source]

Print an informational message to stderr.

Parameters:

msg (str) – Message to display.

pipeline.run_csc.main()[source]

Entry point for running the Hippocampus pipeline on CSC Puhti.

Performs the following steps: 1. Parse command-line arguments. 2. Check prerequisites (Snakemake >= 8). 3. Gather configuration (CLI + interactive prompts). 4. Print a summary of the configuration. 5. Validate paths (skipped in dry-run mode). 6. Confirm execution with the user (unless –yes). 7. Setup environment variables for Apptainer + SLURM. 8. Write Snakemake profile. 9. Execute the pipeline (with optional dry-run, force, clean). 10. Optional cleanup of intermediate files after successful completion.

Returns:

Exits the program with code 0 on success or 1 on failure.

Return type:

None

pipeline.run_csc.ok(msg)[source]

Print a success message to stderr.

Parameters:

msg (str) – Message to display.

pipeline.run_csc.parse_line(line, st)[source]

Parse a single Snakemake log line to update progress state.

Recognizes job counts, current rule, subject, SLURM submissions, and errors.

Parameters:

  • line (str) – A line of Snakemake log output.

  • st (dict) – Dictionary tracking current pipeline state.

pipeline.run_csc.print_summary(cfg)[source]

Print a configuration summary table to stderr.

Parameters:

cfg (dict) – Pipeline configuration dictionary.

pipeline.run_csc.prompt(label, default=None)[source]

Prompt the user for input.

Parameters:

  • label (str) – Prompt label to display.

  • default (str, optional) – Default value returned if user presses Enter.

Returns:

User-provided value or the default if empty.

Return type:

str

pipeline.run_csc.render_bar(st, prefix='Pipeline')[source]

Render a single-line progress bar in stderr for pipeline execution.

Parameters:

  • st (dict) – Dictionary tracking current pipeline state.

  • prefix (str) – Optional prefix string for the progress display.

pipeline.run_csc.run_pipeline(cfg, profile_path, *, dry_run=False, force=False, clean=False, set_threads=None)[source]

Execute the Hippocampus pipeline using Snakemake with live progress tracking.

Supports dry-run mode, forced re-execution, and optional cleanup of stale Snakemake metadata. Displays a progress bar and summary, capturing errors and duration.

Parameters:

  • cfg (dict) – Pipeline configuration dictionary (from gather_config).

  • profile_path (str) – Path to the Snakemake profile directory.

  • dry_run (bool, default False) – If True, only display planned jobs without executing.

  • force (bool, default False) – If True, force re-run all rules (–forceall).

  • clean (bool, default False) – If True, remove .snakemake metadata before running.

  • set_threads (list of str or None) – Optional list of thread overrides for specific rules (e.g., [“hsf_segmentation=4”]).

Returns:

True if pipeline completed successfully without errors, else False.

Return type:

bool

pipeline.run_csc.setup_environment(cfg)[source]

Prepare environment variables for Apptainer (Singularity) and SLURM.

Ensures TMPDIR exists, sets Apptainer cache, and clears old bind vars.

Parameters:

cfg (dict) – Pipeline configuration dictionary.

pipeline.run_csc.validate_paths(cfg)[source]

Check that required paths exist and return a list of errors.

Parameters:

cfg (dict) – Pipeline configuration dictionary.

Returns:

List of missing or invalid paths.

Return type:

list of str

pipeline.run_csc.write_profile(cfg)[source]

Write Snakemake profile YAML configuration for SLURM execution.

Creates PROFILE_DIR and writes config.yaml with current settings.

Parameters:

cfg (dict) – Pipeline configuration dictionary.

Returns:

Directory path where the profile was written.

Return type:

str
